scripts.setup: cd shared && npm install && npm run build && cd ../api && npm install && npx prisma generate && npx prisma db push && npx prisma db seed && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.build: npm run build:shared && npm run build:api && npm run build:frontend
scripts.db:push: cd api && npx prisma db push
scripts.db:migrate: cd api && npx prisma migrate deploy
scripts.db:seed: cd api && npx prisma db seed
scripts.db:reset: cd api && npx prisma migrate reset --force
scripts.app: npx concurrently "npm run dev:shared" "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:frontend"
